The following METAR Is reported by an inland aerodrome (Eindhoven, The Netherlands), shortly after dawn:

EHEH 010610Z 33005KT 0300 R21/0450 FG NSC 06/06 Q1018=

Considering the above METAR, we can say that the aerodrome is experiencing (1)__ which probably extends from the surface to (2)__.
